meta.title: About DECA | European Technology, American Craftsmanship
meta.description: Elevating home comfort. European technology, American craftsmanship, Massachusetts quality. Learn about DECA Windows & Doors.

hero.heading: About DECA
hero.description: Elevating home comfort. European technology, American craftsmanship, Massachusetts quality. We bring 70 years of German window engineering to American homes — manufactured locally in Westfield, MA.
hero.photoDesc: Фото: производственный цех DECA в Вестфилде, Массачусетс — линия сборки окон

mission.title: Making European Windows Accessible
mission.description: Our mission is to make European-style windows and doors available to everyone by manufacturing them in the USA. Our products prioritize energy efficiency, sound insulation, thermal comfort, security, sleek aesthetics, durability, environmental considerations, and easy maintenance.

difference.title: What Makes DECA Different
difference.subtitle: One of few local tilt & turn window manufacturers in the US.
difference.imageAlt: DECA window profile cross-section showing multi-chamber design vs standard American windows
difference.heading: European Standards, Local Production
difference.description: DECA is one of few local tilt and turn window manufacturers in the US. Taking advantage of German standards and technologies proven over 70 years, we deliver premium quality with the speed and warranties of domestic suppliers. Our well-streamlined production allows for more attainable pricing than European importers.

highlights.title: Factory-Direct Pricing
highlights.desc: No import markups. 30-40% less than European imported windows.

highlights.title: 4-Week Lead Time
highlights.desc: Local manufacturing means faster delivery across the Northeast.

values.title: Built on Quality, Driven by Innovation

items.title: Quality First
items.desc: Every window is manufactured to exacting European standards with premium materials and rigorous quality control.
items.photoDesc: Фото: контроль качества на производстве — проверка профиля

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: We continuously invest in new technologies to improve thermal performance, security, and ease of use.
items.photoDesc: Фото: современное оборудование на заводе DECA

items.title: Customer Satisfaction
items.desc: From initial consultation to installation and after-sale service, we ensure every customer is fully satisfied.
items.photoDesc: Фото: довольный клиент у новых окон DECA в своём доме

members.name: Installation Lead
members.desc: 500+ completed projects across New England. Expert in residential and commercial installation.

factory.title: Our Factory in Westfield, MA
factory.subtitle: All DECA products are manufactured at our modern facility in Westfield, Massachusetts.
